DEF'S CONTCE REQUEST DENIAL COPY MAILED.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HARRISON, DAISIE FLOR V. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ACAP, WILFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
